text:
Once upon a time in a lush, green forest, there was a curious kitten named Whisker Paws. Whisker Paws was the most mischievous and playful cat in the whole forest. One sunny morning, while exploring a new part of the forest, Whisker Paws stumbled upon a hidden garden filled with colorful flowers and vibrant butterflies.

Intrigued, Whisker Paws began to playfully chase the butterflies around the garden, each flutter of their wings sending tiny petals dancing in the air. As Whisker Paws played, they noticed a tiny, injured butterfly struggling to fly. With a flick of its tail, Whisker Paws gently brushed the butterfly clean, removing a speck of dirt that had stuck to its wing.

Seeing this, all the other butterflies gathered around, and together they helped Whisker Paws nurse the butterfly back to health. They fluttered around the kitten, tickling its nose with their wings, and Wh
